title: Cuneiform Tablet #0682: Early Dynastic Lexical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a lexical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a lexical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Lexical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records lexical matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
